complaint.bad-experience:sorry-text: We're sorry you had a bad experience. Please share your feedback with us.
good-review.good-experience:sorry-text: Great! You liked our services. Would you like to rate us on Google?
submission.thank-you-message: We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We will look into the issue as soon as possible.
pricing.monthly-plan-description: Ideal for businesses that need flexibility with monthly payments.
pricing.yearly-plan-description: Save 20% by opting for an annual subscription.
